draft_note: Only 1.5B-int4 shares the 7B tokenizer family in ~/models (no 0.5B, no 3B); brief's 3-draft matrix collapses to one draft.

findings.ngram_prefill_hurts: ngram=8 dropped K=4 acceptance 0.606 -> 0.323; suppress ngram for neural draft.
findings.int4_logit_ties: Quantized lm_head produces exactly-equal max logits; batched-verify [1,K] vs sequential-decode [1,1] flips near-ties, so greedy output is NOT bit-identical on int4 (fundamental quant property, not a bug).
findings.long_context_collapse: SpeculativeGenerator verify cost scales with context length; net throughput collapses to 0.06-0.16x at p4000 — the article's target metric.

decision_reason: Net tok/s < 1.0x at short context, 0.06-0.16x at p4000, and outputs non-identical on int4. Triggers all three v5.2 revert conditions (net <1.3%, acceptance economics, outputs differ).
action_taken: Restored server.py spec activation gate to `temperature > 0.0` (draft/verify opt-in only). Kept harmless correctness fixes (bf16->float32 cast, vocab-width align, greedy-match verify branch) and the --draft-depth plumbing as latent infrastructure.
